title: RogueLite Storage
description: Adds a safe in which items will persist between worlds
body:
RogueLite Storage adds a progression solution for hardcore packs.\ This mod adds a safe which has 9 slots, but it's no regular safe.\ It's contents will persist between worlds meaning you get chose what you want to save for a future world.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
